changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Kindhearted Older Sister"

TextENGNew: ``...Ah, Minai-san.@k@vS20/31/VTT_fujita3042. Is something wrong?``

``Ahahahaha, Fujita-san.@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3002. Don't you think the name ``Minai-san`` is confusing when my sister and I are together?@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3003. You're welcome to call me ``Madoka`` you know.``
``Ah, ahaha...@k@vS20/31/VTT_fujita3044. All right, Madoka-san.``

Fujita-san made a bitter smile after correcting himself with a look of embarrassment on his face. I wouldn't have minded at all if he'd used ``-chan`` instead, but this was just the kind of guy he was.
...I've felt significantly more eyes around the office staring daggers at me and talking behind my back since I announced my engagement to Kaoru-san, maybe even the majority of them.
However, this man falls into the minority on that. There's no guarantee, but I'm confident of that.
``Is Sis... no, I mean is Chief Inspector Minai here?``
``Minai-san?@k@vS20/31/VTT_fujita3046. ...She's out right now.@k@vS20/31/VTT_fujita3047. She said she wanted to be alone for a while, so she left...``
``...Is that so?``
After hearing that, I looked over at the empty Assistant Director seat. ...It seems to have gotten more desolate since I heard about the incident.
``Fujita-san, it sounds like you've been helping out a lot lately.@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3007. ...Thanks for everything.``
``No, I haven't done much.@k@vS20/31/VTT_fujita3049. Really, Minai-san is the one...``
...When Sis came back from the crime scene yesterday evening, I could tell even without knowing the circumstances myself... she was worn to the bone.
``...Sis?@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3009. Why...``
When I called out to her in the hallway... Sis gently tapped me on the shoulder and smiled... then headed for the first investigation division's floor without a single word.
Normally, she'd say ``Don't call me Sis at work`` in a deliberately formal tone, but now...
``The girl who passed away... was it someone Sis was close to?``

``Not especially...@k@vS20/31/VTT_fujita3051. She was someone who provided us with information, and they met face to face a few times.@k@vS20/31/VTT_fujita3052. If anything, it's the circumstances of her death... that your sister couldn't take.@k@vS20/31/VTT_fujita3053. She's wondering if she could have prevented this tragedy if she'd noticed it sooner...``
I understood. ...Sis was that kind of person.
She tried to stay dedicated to her job, wishing she were omnipotent despite being well aware no one was.
And when she fails at her job, she harshly blames herself... and falls into deep depression.
Detectives are not gods. So it's likely nobody will blame Sis. ...But she just can't set aside her feelings... she's really awkward that way.
``......Fujita-san.@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3013. I've thought something from time to time.@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3014. That in all honesty... Sis might not be able to handle being a detective.``
``Madoka-san...?``

``Right now, how many people do you think are dying within the Kakiuchi Station jurisdiction area alone?@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3016. Do you have any idea how many people are currently committing crimes?@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3017. Ten, twenty... maybe even a hundred people are grieving, suffering... and dying.@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3018. If you feel sympathy or regret for every last one of them... your heart won't last.``

``Plus, the police are human beings... They're not omnipotent.@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3020. Even they make mistakes, and there are things they can't do.@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3021. Even so, Sis always put in so much work to respond to everyone, always moving here and there,@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3022. ...exhausting herself, and enduring the pain.@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3023. Even though she'll completely break... unless she can better set aside her feelings...``
``...Madoka-san.``

Since she was young, she's had a stronger sense of justice than anyone around her. I think it's due to the influence of our deceased father. He was like that, and she was the one who most closely watched over him.
I looked up to our sincere and compassionate parents, too.
...But, I grew to reject that after years of seeing how that philosophy always resulted in the two of us drawing the short end of the stick.
Besides, I... have watched her get depressed and sad whenever she fails from up close all this time.
...That's why, whenever I see her in pain about it, I get the urge to complain to our parents for making her suffer by drilling the wrong mindset into her.

``...Sis is too kind.@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3025. Even though she acts tough, she's always thinking of others.@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3026. She's worked hard to pass the exams and earn the qualifications to walk the path of elites... but it all seems like a waste.@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3027. She's become a great detective, so she'd be on the road to success if she could only set aside her feelings and crack down on criminals where she can, not overstretching herself...``

``Hahahaha, that's quite the thing to say.@k@vS20/31/VTT_fujita3058. So you're saying we police officers should only arrest criminals to further our own personal career interests?@k@vS20/31/VTT_fujita3059. You're saying that taking the circumstances of the perpetrators and the grief of the victims into account... is unnecessary?``
``Ah... I-I'm sorry.@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3029. I didn't mean it like that...``
``No, I understand. I know what you mean.``
Fujita-san played it off facetiously and smiled. ...And then, he spoke while gazing off into the distance with a gentle expression.

``...Indeed, Minai-san is not very astute.@k@vS20/31/VTT_fujita3062. If she was smart, she never would have considered working her hardest despite having been sent to this remote location with a ranking as high as hers.``

``But... uh, please keep that a secret, ok?@k@vS20/31/VTT_fujita3064. I'm sure it would only upset her.@k@vS20/31/VTT_fujita3065. ...It's because of that personality of her's that we look up to her as our reliable boss.@k@vS20/31/VTT_fujita3066. She may indeed be a little too reckless for her own good, but she's serious and earnest...@k@vS20/31/VTT_fujita3067. Seeing her sense of justice is refreshing.@k@vS20/31/VTT_fujita3068. ...On the contrary, I want to rise up to the top as soon as I can. That's just the kind of person I am.``
``...Fujita-san.``
``Besides...``
``...Besides what?``
``No, just thinking about how you two really are sisters.@k@vS20/31/VTT_fujita3071. The way you consider and worry about others like you did just now is exactly like her.``

``...We are nothing alike.@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3034. I didn't fight like her... I ran away.@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3035. At this point it's impossible for me to catch up to her... and I don't intend to, either.``
...That's why my heart aches.
Sis really put in a lot of effort and worked hard until now... and she gained the qualifications she needed to be happy.
So nobody can complain to her about her lack of rest in body and mind. She won't let them.
But she's still operating at full speed, diving head first into all sorts of difficulties and hardships.

``......I don't want to be like her.@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3037. I don't want Sis to end up like our father.@k@vS20/29/VTT_madoka3038. People who work hard having nothing to show for it...? That can't possibly be right.``
Kaoru-san must have thought he was doing me a favor by transferring her to Kakiuchi Station. ...But it seems that plan backfired, and it only made me feel worse.
